title: agrostis alba var. simensis
intro: Agrostis alba var. simensis is a variant of the Agrostis alba species, commonly known as a type of grass. It is traditionally used in Ethiopian folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and analgesic properties. Agrostis alba var. simensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application to aid in wound healing and skin infections.
